title: dispermotheca viscosa var. australis
intro: Dispermotheca viscosa var. australis, also known as the sticky stembark, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dispermotheca viscosa var. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
